SUPPORT

Need help? Found a bug? We've got you.

REPORT A BUG

Something broken? A game crashing, a button not working, or something just acting weird? Fill out a quick bug report and we'll look into it.

Include the game name, what happened, and what you expected to happen — that helps us fix it faster.

🐛   OPEN BUG REPORT FORM

CONTACT US

For anything else — questions, feedback, or just to say hi — you can reach us by email.

✉   support@ee-games.com

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

  • Do I need an account to play? — Nope. Just click and play.
  • Are the games free? — Yes. Always.
  • Will you collect my data? — No. See our Privacy Policy.
  • My game progress disappeared — Game saves are stored locally in your browser. Clearing cookies/site data will reset them.
  • A game isn't loading — Try a hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R / Cmd+Shift+R) or a different browser.
EE GAMES
